title: HUD Tab Shell & Badge System
description: Rename all 5 HUD tabs to workflow-oriented names, add notification badge counts, and wire furniture clicks to open specific tabs contextually.

scope.in: SidePanel.tsx tab definitions (HudTab type, TAB_LIST, TAB_ICONS, TabStrip), badge count hook, furniture-to-tab click mapping in CanvasOffice.tsx/GamePage.tsx, pixel-types.ts HudTab union
scope.out: Panel content rewrites (handled by hud-panel-rewrites project), new backend data sources, game engine changes

dod.criterion: HudTab type is 'team' | 'action' | 'ops' | 'directive' | 'log' across all files
TabStrip renders 5 tabs with updated names and icons
useBadgeCounts() hook returns counts for Action (waiting items), Directive (active pipeline), Ops (failing goals), Team (idle agents)
Badge dots/counts render on tabs with non-zero counts
Clicking CEO desk furniture opens Action tab, whiteboard opens Directive tab, bookshelf opens Log tab

tasks.title: Rename HudTab Union Types & Constants
tasks.user_scenario: Player sees tabs labeled Team, Action, Ops, Directive, Log instead of the old names
tasks.scope: Rename HudTab union in types.ts from 'inbox'|'projects'|'intel'|'wiki' to 'action'|'ops'|'directive'|'log'. Update TAB_LIST, TAB_ICONS in SidePanel.tsx. Update all references in GameHeader.tsx, GamePage.tsx.

dod.criterion: TAB_LIST, TAB_ICONS updated in SidePanel.tsx with new names
All imports/references to old tab names updated across GameHeader.tsx, GamePage.tsx, types.ts
App compiles with zero TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Badge Count Hook & Tab Rendering
tasks.user_scenario: Player sees red badge dots on tabs that have pending items, drawing attention to what needs action
tasks.scope: Create useBadgeCounts() hook and render badge indicators in TabStrip and GameHeader HudButtons.

dod.criterion: useBadgeCounts() hook exists and returns { team: number, action: number, ops: number, directive: number, log: number }
Badge dots render on tabs with count > 0, hidden when 0
Badge counts update reactively when store state changes
Badge styling matches pixel-art aesthetic (small colored dot or number)

tasks.title: Contextual Furniture-to-Tab Wiring
tasks.user_scenario: Player clicks the CEO desk and the Action tab opens; clicks the whiteboard and the Directive tab opens
tasks.scope: Update furniture click handlers in GamePage.tsx via FURNITURE_TAB_MAP constant.

dod.criterion: CEO desk click opens Action tab in side panel
Furniture-tab mapping is configurable via a constant object, not scattered if-else

sequencing_rationale: Tab renames must land first so all downstream code references the new names. Badges build on the renamed tabs. Furniture wiring is independent but lower priority.
